calendar.matters:
Petition To Modify Fund Restriction
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Clausen for (petitioner) Breathe California, Golden Gate Public Health.

The Court stated that it has the non-opposition by the Attorney General and asked counsel if there is anything else. The Court granted the petition to Modify Fund Restriction (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
